The '''Empire Youth''' were [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] members and minions of Lord [[Hethrir]]'s [[Empire Reborn]] faction. Members of the organization were recruited from the top [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctors]] and were distinguished by their knee-length pale blue coats. Once [[Desann]] became the second in command of the Imperial Empire Reborn faction, he was tasked with their training. He took one of them, [[Tavion Axmis]], to be his apprentice. The [[Helpers]] were the lowest members of the Youth.

==History==
Eventually Desann led the Empire Youths to the [[Valley of the Jedi]], where he infused them and himself with its energies turning them into skilled individuals, leaving him with a Dark Jedi army he called the Reborn.
With his newly acquired Reborn, Desann and Admiral [[Galak Fyyar]], weapon scientist and military leader of the Empire Reborn, attacked [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]] to destroy the Jedi once and for all.

Though [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] showed up, the ship of Desann, the ''[[Doomgiver]]'', would not give in and troops began to be deployed. Unfortunately for the Empire Reborn's evil schemes, [[Kyle Katarn]] was present on the ship and he heavily sabotaged it, and was the one who brought in Rogue Squadron as well. After battling Galak Fyyar himself, who was fighting with his special battle suit, Kyle proceeded to escape the ''Doomgiver'' as he had also destroyed the shield generator.

Rogue Squadron destroyed the ''Doomgiver'', and the bulk of the Reborn were destroyed aboard the ship. Thus ended most of the former Empire Youths, but some escaped even though Desann was slain on Yavin. Those that escaped rallied under Desann's apprentice, Tavion, and with new Cultist followers infused with the Force by the [[Scepter of Ragnos]], formed the Disciples of Ragnos cult. On [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] the [[Disciples of Ragnos]] sought to resurrect [[Marka Ragnos]], but in an [[Battle of Korriban (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|epic battle]] the Jedi intervened - having Jedi Knight [[Jaden Korr]] to defeat Tavion and Marka Ragnos - and once and for all ended those that were once known as Empire Youths, Tavion with them.
